message:
docs: comprehensive provider baseline audit refresh, coverage map update, and testing policy revision

Bulk refresh of provider documentation and QA infrastructure docs from
concurrent agent audit work:

Provider documentation (major updates):
- docs/provider-baseline-audit.json: expanded from ~300 to ~3400 lines
  with detailed per-provider audit entries covering auth, routing,
  streaming, error handling, and test obligations for all registered
  providers including new stackit, ollama, v0 entries
- docs/provider-canonical-id-table.json: updated canonical ID mappings
  reflecting new provider additions and alias chain changes
- docs/provider-implementation-modes.json: restructured implementation
  mode documentation (2051 line delta) with clearer categorization of
  OpenAI-compatible, native adapter, and hybrid provider modes
- docs/provider-support-baseline-audit.md: refreshed human-readable
  provider support matrix
- docs/provider-upstream-catalog-snapshot.json/md: updated upstream
  catalog snapshots reflecting current models.dev state
- docs/providers.md: minor updates to provider overview

QA and testing documentation:
- docs/coverage-baseline-map.json: refreshed non-mock coverage baseline
  with updated module-level coverage percentages
- docs/test_double_inventory.json: expanded test double inventory from
  ~400 to ~1800 lines with comprehensive mock/stub/fake classification
- docs/testing-policy.md: revised testing policy with updated allowlist
  entries, expiry dates, and replacement plans
- docs/qa-runbook.md: minor addition to QA runbook procedures

New documentation artifacts:
- docs/provider-gaps-test-matrix.json: gap analysis matrix identifying
  untested provider capabilities and prioritized test targets
- docs/provider-groq-capability-profile.json: detailed Groq provider
  capability profile for test planning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
